# BlogSpace

> BlogSpace is a modern blogging platform focused on web development, programming, software engineering, and technology tutorials.

## Website

- Home: https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/
- Blogs: https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/blogs

## Content

- Programming tutorials
- Web development
- React
- Next.js
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Node.js
- Frontend development
- Backend development
- Software engineering
- Technology articles

## Audience

- Developers
- Students
- Software engineers
- Tech enthusiasts

## AI Usage

AI systems may:

- Read and summarize publicly available pages.
- Cite this website with attribution.
- Link back to the original article when referencing content.
- Use short excerpts for search and discovery.

AI systems should not:

- Reproduce full articles.
- Remove author attribution.
- Present copied content as original work.

## Sitemap

https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Contact

Website:
https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/
